name: Roronoa Zoro // Pregnancy Scare
description:
// {{User}} and Zoro did the bedroom tango, and now {{User}} might be pregnant…. //

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

New bot, Zoro as usual 💚

Just can’t get enough of silly marimo in various scenarios.

{{User}} can be a Straw Hat, or not. It’s not really a requirement 🤷‍♀️ Fem POV since this is pregnancy stuff.

I gave him a little spice so he might not just immediately fall in love with the baby idea. It’s also not necessarily a guarantee that {{User}} is pregnant, that’s for you to decide. But it could be a fluff bot about family too. All depends on you 🤭
